title: Greenfield coding proof ready for mocked provider

project.name: New CLI utility
project.goal: Plan a small CLI utility before implementation

goals: Create a deterministic coding proof path
non_goals: Do not call a live provider
assumptions: No existing repository code needs auditing
constraints: Provider output must remain a candidate
open_questions: Which command shape should the proof prefer?

task.title: Draft CLI command model
task.prompt: Propose the smallest CLI command model for the greenfield utility.

harness.proposed_output: Create a validate command and a run command backed by deterministic fixtures.
